candidates.why: Exact match for total current assets on the balance sheet.
Balancing/subtotal line, not the preferred reported total.
Non-current assets, not current assets.
Non-current balancing line, not current assets.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit balance-sheet total for current assets.

candidates.why: Exact balance-sheet cash line; capitalization varies by year.
Exact balance-sheet cash line; lowercase variant appears in other years.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at end of period
candidates.why: Cash flow statement ending cash, useful cross-check but balance sheet is preferred for CHE.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at beginning of period
candidates.why: Beginning cash, not the balance-sheet point-in-time target.

variables.notes: Used the two exact balance-sheet label variants as a priority list because capitalization changes across years.

candidates.why: Exact match for total current liabilities on the balance sheet.
Only a component of current liabilities, not the total.
Debt-related current liability component, not total current liabilities.
Balancing/component line, not preferred over explicit total.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit total current liabilities line.

candidates.why: Best semantic match for short-term debt/current interest-bearing borrowings; excludes lease wording and appears cleaner than maturity detail.
Also matches current portion of long-term debt, but likely a time-varying/less complete detail line versus the cleaner total current debt line.

variables.notes: R:c. Chose the clean total short-term debt line outside the shortlist. Excluded lease liability rows per instruction and avoided combining with maturities line to prevent double counting.

candidates.why: Exact match for current taxes payable/current tax liabilities.

variables.notes: Direct match for taxes payable/current tax liabilities.

candidates.why: Best balance-sheet PPE-type line available; appears to represent net tangible fixed assets/PPE and is preferable to gross or accumulated component rows.
PPE-related but gross component only, not preferred when a cleaner net-type line exists.

candidates.row_label: Right of Use Tangible Assets - Capital/Finance Lease - Gross
candidates.why: Tangible asset line but lease-related and gross; not preferred for baseline PPE.
Not PPE.

variables.notes: No explicit total PP&E line is shown. Chose 'Other fixed assets' outside the shortlist as the closest reported balance-sheet PPE/net tangible fixed assets line, preferring it over gross/accumulated component rows and lease-related assets.

candidates.why: Exact match for total assets.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit total assets line.

candidates.why: Exact match for net cash flow from operating activities; preferred over pre-working-capital subtotal.

candidates.row_label: Cash flow from operating activities before changes in working capital
candidates.why: Operating cash flow subtotal before working-capital changes, not the final net operating cash flow.

variables.notes: Selected the final net operating cash flow line rather than the before-working-capital subtotal.
